usage: Repository overrides for CodeScene code health scoring. Only test code is relaxed: table-driven and fixture-heavy Rust tests are inherently similar, so duplication- and size-oriented smells fire on healthy, intention-revealing test structure. Production code keeps the default rule set.

rule_sets.matching_content_path_doc: Integration test crates: parameterized cases, fixture staging, and assertion tables are deliberately repetitive.
Unit test submodules split out of their parent modules; the same test-shape leniency as tests/**.
Single-file unit test modules; the same test-shape leniency as tests/**.
Suffix-named unit test files; the same test-shape leniency as tests/**.
